title: Guarding the Safe - From Guardrail to Policy Engine
description:
Shebin John, R&D, Safe

An overview of Safe’s evolving stack of onchain security guards, ranging from simple delegatecall protection to configurable rule sets and modular, multi-policy enforcement. Explore how layered guards can enhance wallet safety at every level.

https://defisecuritysummit.org/schedule
track: DeFi Security Summit 2025 - Nogal Stage - Day 2
